headline: Goldman Sachs has crucial message for gold investors in 2026
summary: Goldman Sachs thought it knew how much gold central banks were buying. It was wrong by more than 70%. And the correction to that model has significant implications for where gold prices are heading in the second half of 2026. Goldman analysts Lina Thomas and Daan Struyven published a note on May 18 ...

headline: 3 Reasons to Sell GS and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Since May 2021, the S&P 500 has delivered a total return of 78.6%. But one standout stock has more than doubled the market - over the past five years, Goldman Sachs has surged 162% to $968.96 per share. Its momentum hasn’t stopped as it’s also gained 24.9% in the last six months thanks to its solid quarterly results, beating the S&P by 13.4%.
